screen_example.title: Welcome on The $t(common_appName.full)
screen_example.description: Do you want to discover some features? Just click on one of the three buttons at the bottom of the screen. The first allows you to call a REST API. The second lets you change the theme color. And the third allows you to change the language.

error_boundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong.
error_boundary.description: We are sorry for the inconvenience. Please try again later.

streak.title: Reading Streak
streak.subtitle: Read every day to keep your streak alive!

story_detail.mock_description: A thrilling adventure in a mystical world where ancient secrets unfold through the hero's steps...
story_detail.title: Story Detail

reader.mock_chapter_text:
In the infinite void of the universe, there was a world known as NovaTales. It was once a peaceful land, where humans and mythical creatures lived together in harmony under the protection of the Tree of Life, Yggdrasil. However, peace did not last forever...

One night, the sky suddenly turned blood red. A massive lightning bolt struck the heart of Yggdrasil, splitting the thousand-year-old tree in half. From the crack, a dark shadow burst out and covered the world. It was the rise of the Shadow Lord - who had been sealed for tens of thousands of years.

Our protagonist, Leo, a young man from a small village on the edge of the Silent Forest, was still unaware of the destiny that awaited him. He was just an ordinary hunter, entering the forest every day to search for herbs and hunt small game to feed his family.

Until he picked up a stone emitting a strange turquoise light. The stone carried an unusually warm energy, dispelling the freezing cold of winter and the fear in his heart. From that moment, Leo's life turned to a completely new chapter, pulling him into a fateful adventure to protect the world...
